RULING - A R G U E D - Due to a clerical error, an incorrect tentative ruling was posted by the Court in this matter. The Court vacated its posted tentative ruling, and adopted the following correct and intended ruling as its order: DEFENDANTS MARK CHANEY AND CHANEY CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S DEMURRERS TO COMPLAINT are OVERRULED. Res judicata and estoppel do not apply because the judgment in the first suit was not adverse to plaintiffs. See Slater, 15 C3d at 794; Vandenberg, 21 C4th at 828. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)
